docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2021 - CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO ALLOW TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO AUG-26-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. COURT DISCLOSURE IS GIVEN. PLAINTIFF TIFFANY VINSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JONATHAN PINEDA IS PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PINEDA, JONATHAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2021 - PLAINTIFF TIFFANY VINSON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. COURT ALLOW PLAINTIFF'S APPEARANCE BY ZOOM DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S ILLNESS. DEFENDANT JONATHAN PINEDA IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. THE FOLLOWING RELATED CASES ARE HEARD CONSECUTIVELY WITH THIS MATTER: CSM-21-864351 SHARLA FRANKLIN V. JONATHAN PINEDA; CSM-21-864352 LEARLINE MARSHALL V. JONATHAN PINEDA; CSM-21-864350 - COURTNEY PELLETE V. JONATHAN PINEDA; PLAINTIFF SHARLA FRANKLIN PROVIDES TESTIMONY OF BEHALF OF ALL PARTIES. PLAINTIFF TIFFANY VINSON PROVIDES TESTIMONY ON HER OWN BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VINSON, TIFFANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINEDA, JONATHAN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,185.00, *SEE ATTACHED MC-025** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL BY DEFENDANT **GRANTED** HEARING DATE-7/29/21 @ 8:30AM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON AUG-26-2021)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PINEDA, JONATHAN
